title: Integrated Derivative
description: Fix bugs and resolve performance issues in Integrated Terminals and Integrated Tunnels
body:
This mod fixes a number of bugs in Integrated Dynamics and its addons on 1.12 while adding some extra utility. Some highlights are:

* Improves JEI support for the Logic Programmer with automatic recipe compression and JEI dragging functionality
* Decreases the time spent by the server to process shift-clicking in the crafting grid of the mod by the factor of 64 in large modpacks
* Improves various QOL issues with the mod to make it more familiar to users of Applied Energistics
* Fixes dupes with Integrated Terminals

Note: this mod requires Integrated Dynamics and optionally Integrated Terminals, not just MixinBooter! You have to download them from elsewhere because the 1.12 builds aren't hosted on Modrinth.
